subject: Mission intake and scope freeze
description: Collect contract objectives, counterpart constraints, and delivery timeline.

subject: Draft master services agreement
description: Create first pass of MSA terms including payment and termination clauses.

subject: Run clause-level risk review
description: Identify unacceptable liabilities and fallback alternatives.

subject: Compliance cross-check
description: Validate contract language against regional compliance constraints.

subject: Build negotiation strategy
description: Draft redline negotiation plan with fallback positions.

subject: Assemble final legal package
description: Consolidate draft, risk notes, and negotiation package for delivery.
